hibernate-mapping.sql-query: with src as ( select asg.assignment_id, asg.assignment_number, asg.person_id, (select person_number from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.person_id) as person_number, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.person_id) as person_name, asg.billing_organisation_id, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = asg.billing_organisation_id) as billing_organisation_name, asg.eu_organisation_id, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = asg.eu_organisation_id) as eu_organisation_name, asg.asg_active, to_char(asg.assignment_start_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy') as assignment_start_date, to_char(asg.assignment_end_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy') as assignment_end_date, asg.billing_code, asg.billing_code_id, asg.pay_method_id, (select name from hp_payment_methods where pay_method_id = asg.pay_method_id) as payment_method, asg.preferred, decode(asg.wc_org_code_rate_link_id, null, 'N', 'Y') as has_wc, (select decode(nvl(count(*), 0), null, 'N', 0, 'N', 'Y') from prt_assignment_setup where assignment_id = asg.assignment_id) as has_prt, asg.working_state, inv.invoice_date as last_invoice_date, pay.date_earned as last_paid_date from hp_assignments_d asg, (select source_id as assignment_id, to_char(max(invoice_date), 'dd-MM-yyyy') as invoice_date from hp_invoice where source = 'ASSIGNMENT' group by source_id ) inv, (select assignment_id, to_char(max(date_earned), 'dd-MM-yyyy') as date_earned from hp_balance group by assignment_id ) pay where asg.assignment_id = inv.assignment_id(+) and asg.assignment_id = pay.assignment_id(+) ) select * from src where 1 = 1 ${auto_fill} ${where_clause} ${order_by_clause}
